name: Alterity Therapeutics Limited
analysis: ATH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.5750, stop A$0.3960, target A$1.1120 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
